confirmed_behavior.expected: Total should update to $25.00 (and match the subtotal) when quantity is 2 for the only item in the cart.
confirmed_behavior.observed: With quantity set to 2 for a $12.50 item, the cart displays Subtotal $25.00 but Total: $12.50.

reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Click 'Add to cart' for Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
In the cart, set Quantity to 2.
Observe that Total remains $12.50 while Subtotal shows $25.00.
title: Cart Total shows unit price instead of subtotal when quantity > 1
